productDisplayName: Murcia Women Checked Purse Multi Handbags
description: The look of this murcia bag is contemporary and the feel is of pure luxury. Created using exotic material, intricate embroideries and international silhouettes, it's vibrant hues and rich textures are just some of the unique features of this murcia bag. This bag is a must have for every woman with style and panache for fashion.Made of high quality fabric with wooden blocks as a part of decorationOne main zippered chamber with a sub-chamber insideMobile case and wallet case stitched on the insideComfortable haul strapsHandles in wood lending in Japanese silhouetteBag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
